name: traderframe
description: GateZero-controlled, evidence-gated research and paper-simulation decision system for TraderFrame.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.js prettier.config.js ".github/**/*.yml" "apps/**/*.{md,json,ts,js,html,css}" "packages/**/*.{md,json,ts,js}" "scripts/**/*.ts" "docs/**/*.{md,json}" "ops/**/*.{md,json}" "skills/**/*.{md,json,yaml,yml}"
scripts.check:repository: pnpm check:runtime-status && pnpm check:gate0-docs-coverage && pnpm check:gate0-tracklist && pnpm check:gate0-snapshot && pnpm check:gate0-name && pnpm check:gate0-evidence-index && pnpm check:gate0-command-center && pnpm check:gate0-command-center-render && pnpm check:market-workspace && pnpm check:market-intelligence-sources && pnpm check:backtest-evidence && pnpm check:intelligence-brief && pnpm check:case-catalog && pnpm check:simulator-workspace && pnpm check:gate0-skills && pnpm check:gate0-skill-routing && pnpm check:gate0-agents && pnpm check:gate0-actions-runtime && pnpm check:gate0-source-links && pnpm check:gate0-tracklist-sections && pnpm check:repo-hygiene && pnpm check:gate1-contracts && pnpm check:gate0-reviews && pnpm validate:gate0
scripts.generate:artifacts: pnpm snapshot:gate0-progress && pnpm snapshot:case-catalog && pnpm snapshot:simulator-workspace && pnpm snapshot:backtest-evidence && pnpm snapshot:intelligence-brief
scripts.verify: pnpm check:repository && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ci
